title: Peloton Q2 2024 Earnings: Mixed Results and Outlook
text: Peloton Q2 FY2024 Earnings and Guidance. Financial Results: Peloton reported a loss per share of 54 cents versus 53 cents expected. Revenue of $743.6 million versus $733.5 million expected. The company beat revenue expectations but missed on the bottom line. Forward Guidance: Management was keen to argue that the outlook for the remainder of fiscal 2024 implies that the worst of Peloton's right-sizing has already taken place. Outlook Scenario: In the absolute best case scenario, Peloton was expected to guide towards mid-single digit growth rates as a forward run-rate for the remainder of fiscal 2024. Negative Revenue Growth: Peloton was about to deliver approximately negative 5% year-over-year revenue growth rates for its fiscal Q2 2024 results, indicating the company's struggle with demand normalization post-pandemic. Cost Structure: The company was continuing its cost reduction initiatives while attempting to position for return to growth in the out quarters.
